title: Sobolev and isoperimetric inequalities for submanifolds in weighted   ambient spaces
summary:
In this paper, we prove a Sobolev and isoperimetric inequalities for
submanifold in weighted manifold. Our results generalize the Hoffman-Spruck's
inequalities.

title: Comment to "General Solution to Unidimensional Hamilton-Jacobi Equation"   [arXiv:1302.0591v1]
comment:
Comment to the paper by Lewtchuk Espindola Maria "General Solution to
  Unidimensional Hamilton-Jacobi Equation", arXiv:1302.0591v1
summary:
We present previous results on the general solution of the multidimensional
Hamilton-Jacobi equation $\frac{\partial u}{\partial t} - \frac{\partial
u}{\partial x_a} \frac{\partial u}{\partial x_a}= 0$ and methods that were used
to find such general solution.

title: Global dynamics below the ground state energy for the   Klein-Gordon-Zakharov system in the 3D radial case
comment:
24 pages. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with
  arXiv:1206.2457
summary:
We consider the global dynamics below the ground state energy for the
Klein-Gordon-Zakharov system in the 3D radial case; and obtain the dichotomy
between scattering and finite time blow up.
